body.title: D-web-reply-coherence-inhibitor-fix-2026-04-23
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-web-reply-coherence-inhibitor-fix-2026-04-23

**Closed at:** 2026-04-23T16:52:02.231978+00:00
**Ticket count:** 4 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-coherence-inhibitor-llm-gate (S) — Fix: coherence inhibitor suppresses LLM replies (wrong metric for non-habits)  `done` — suppress_incoherent now gates on source_label.startswith('habit:'). LLM replies no longer suppressed. main.py caller passes _source_label. 15 tests. 49030c61.
- T-main-logger-hierarchy (S) — Fix: main.py uses wrong logger name — diagnostics silently discarded  `done` — 5 getLogger(__name__) → getLogger('igor.main'). b9688b6b.
- T-openrouter-model-attr-typo (S) — Fix: openrouter_reasoner.py:520 self._model() should be self.model  `done` — self._model() → self.model. b9688b6b.
- T-replay-log-error-positional (S) — Fix: replay.py calls log_error() with positional args (keyword-only function)  `done` — 5 positional log_error() → keyword form. b9688b6b.

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: unknown.
